name: sap-abap-mcp
description: Develop, test, analyze, and operate SAP ABAP systems through ADT from AI coding agents.
long_description: SAP ABAP MCP is a local-only Model Context Protocol server that enables AI coding agents to develop, test, analyze, and operate SAP ABAP systems through the official ABAP Development Tools HTTP services. It supports repository search and source editing, semantic services, activation, ABAP Unit and ATC, transports, abapGit, RAP generation, debugging, runtime dumps and traces, cross-system comparison, dependency analysis, and guarded refactoring. SAP profiles and credentials remain on the user's computer, with passwords protected by macOS Keychain or Windows DPAPI. SAP-dependent capabilities are validated against the user's own SAP release, configuration, and authorizations.

tools.name: abap_activate
tools.description: Activate one legacy object or one same-connection batch of 1 through 100 ABAP objects.

tools.name: abap_debug_breakpoint
tools.description: Set or remove line breakpoints for an adt:// ABAP source URI.

tools.name: abap_debug_session
tools.description: Start a non-blocking SAP debugger listener, stop it, or inspect its state. A separate stateful ADT client is used after a debuggee attaches.

tools.name: abap_debug_stack
tools.description: Get the current attached debuggee stack and stable frame IDs.

tools.name: abap_debug_status
tools.description: Return listener, debuggee attachment, and breakpoint state for a connection.

tools.name: abap_debug_step
tools.description: Continue or step an attached ABAP debuggee and return the new raw stack.

tools.name: abap_debug_variable
tools.description: Read variables or evaluate an ABAP expression in a selected stack frame. Call abap_debug_stack first for frameId.

tools.name: abap_download
tools.description: Download one ABAP source object or the readable objects in a package to an absolute local folder.

tools.name: abap_fs_documentation
tools.description: Read or search the bundled ABAP FS compatibility and sap-abap-mcp settings reference.

tools.name: adt_discovery_export
tools.description: Return an ADT capability summary, explicitly return full discovery data, or export it to a local JSON file.

tools.name: analyze_abap_dumps
tools.description: List SAP runtime dumps or retrieve and normalize one dump's HTML content.

tools.name: analyze_abap_traces
tools.description: List SAP trace runs/configurations or inspect a trace summary, statements, or aggregated hit list.

tools.name: compare_abap_systems
tools.description: Compare the same active ABAP object on two configured SAP systems with a bounded unified diff.

tools.name: create_mermaid_diagram
tools.description: Validate Mermaid code and create an interactive local HTML viewer with zoom controls and SVG export.

tools.name: create_object_programmatically
tools.description: Validate and create an ADT repository object. Non-local packages require an existing or new transport request; a configured profile write allowlist must include the package.

tools.name: create_test_documentation
tools.description: Create a styled Word report from test scenarios and screenshots, returning the local DOCX path.

tools.name: create_test_include
tools.description: Create a class test include under a package permitted by the profile's optional allowlist. A transport is required outside $TMP.

tools.name: detect_mermaid_diagram_type
tools.description: Parse Mermaid code and return its normalized and native Mermaid diagram types.

tools.name: execute_data_query
tools.description: Run a read-only SAP ADT data-preview query, process supplied structured data, return a bounded headless result, or export CSV/XLSX.

tools.name: find_where_used
tools.description: Find ADT usage references for an ABAP object or a symbol position, with filtering, pagination, and optional snippets.

tools.name: get_abap_dependency_graph
tools.description: Build a bounded where-used dependency graph. Edges point from each dependent object to the object it uses.

tools.name: get_abap_diagnostics
tools.description: Run SAP ADT syntax checking for the current source identified by an adt:// workspace URI or ADT path.

tools.name: get_abap_object_info
tools.description: Get repository metadata, ADT structure, source URI, and active source line count.

tools.name: get_abap_object_lines
tools.description: Read active ABAP source lines. objectType disambiguates objects; methodName extracts one class method.

tools.name: get_abap_object_url
tools.description: Generate a SAP WebGUI URL for an ABAP report, class, or function module.

tools.name: get_abap_object_workspace_uri
tools.description: Resolve an exact ABAP object to a stable adt:// URI usable by headless source-edit tools.

tools.name: get_abap_sql_syntax
tools.description: Return the safe SAP ADT data-preview SQL rules used by execute_data_query.

tools.name: get_atc_decorations
tools.description: Return cached headless ATC findings from run_atc_analysis, optionally for one workspace URI.

tools.name: get_batch_lines
tools.description: Read active source ranges from multiple ABAP objects. startLine is zero-based for ABAP FS compatibility.

tools.name: get_connected_systems
tools.description: List configured SAP connection IDs and whether credentials are available. Call this first if connectionId is unknown.

tools.name: get_mermaid_documentation
tools.description: Get bundled syntax, keywords, and usage tips for supported Mermaid diagram types.

tools.name: get_object_by_uri
tools.description: Read active ABAP source directly by ADT object or source URI. startLine is zero-based for ABAP FS compatibility.

tools.name: get_sap_capabilities
tools.description: Report implemented, missing, supported, unsupported, and live-unverified SAP development capabilities for one connection.

tools.name: get_sap_system_info
tools.description: Get SAP client, system type, release, timezone, and optionally the full software component list.

tools.name: get_version_history
tools.description: List repository revisions, retrieve source at a revision, or compare two revision snapshots.

tools.name: inspect_abap_code
tools.description: Use SAP ADT semantic services for completion, documentation, type hierarchy, components, definition, safe quick-fix discovery, or formatter preview. line is one-based and column is zero-based.

tools.name: manage_abap_versions
tools.description: List inactive objects, read inactive source, or preview and execute restoration of a historical source revision.

tools.name: manage_abapgit
tools.description: List, inspect, create, pull, unlink, stage, push, check, or switch abapGit repositories. Credentials come only from the secret store. Create confirmation is PACKAGE:CANONICAL_URL; other mutations use repositoryId.

tools.name: manage_heartbeat
tools.description: Manage an in-process monitoring watchlist, trigger safe SAP connection/query checks, and inspect history.

tools.name: manage_rap_generator
tools.description: Check RAP availability, page schema, get defaults, validate, preview, generate, and manage service bindings. Generate confirms GENERATOR:BINDING; publish confirms BINDING; V2 unpublish confirms BINDING:SERVICE:VERSION.

tools.name: manage_text_elements
tools.description: Read or merge-create/update REPT text-pool symbols, selection texts, and headings using ADT locking, transport enforcement, and activation.

tools.name: manage_transport_requests
tools.description: List, inspect, compare, create, release, delete, reassign, add objects (including LIMU DYNP/REPT subobjects), and resolve SAP transports. release/delete confirmation is the request number; owner/user confirmation is NUMBER:USER; object confirmation is NUMBER:PGMID:TYPE:NAME.

tools.name: open_object
tools.description: Resolve an ABAP object in headless mode and return its ADT and workspace URIs for subsequent reads or edits.

tools.name: refactor_abap_code
tools.description: Preview or execute SAP rename, package move, method extraction, quick-fix, formatting, or deletion. Execute only a fresh plan and copy its exact confirmation value.

tools.name: replace_string_in_abap_object
tools.description: Replace exactly one source fragment, using a fresh read and an under-lock compare before saving. SAP syntax diagnostics are returned. Non-local packages require transport.

tools.name: run_abap_application
tools.description: Check the audited ABAP FS REPL or preview and execute a confirmed class/snippet plan.

tools.name: run_atc_analysis
tools.description: Run the system ATC check variant for an exact object, or retrieve documentation for a prior finding.

tools.name: run_sap_transaction
tools.description: Build a validated SAP WebGUI transaction URL, or launch it with the local default browser. Parameter values use a restricted injection-safe character set.

tools.name: run_unit_tests
tools.description: Run SAP ABAP Unit for an exact repository object and return structured results.

tools.name: search_abap_object_lines
tools.description: Search literal text or a regular expression in active ABAP source. Wildcard object names can scan up to 10 objects.

tools.name: search_abap_objects
tools.description: Search ABAP repository objects by name pattern. Supports SAP ADT wildcards such as * and ?.

tools.name: validate_mermaid_syntax
tools.description: Parse Mermaid code without rendering and return the normalized diagram type.
